commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Updates the `plugins/a2a-gateway` submodule from `a335e59` to `3f0f4f5`, pulling upstream OpenClaw 2026.5.x startup compatibility, inline file-transfer body-limit, and gateway protocol v4 fixes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a dependency submodule bump, not a bug report with a current-main reproduction path. The review path is source, upstream compare, generated-report, and check metadata inspection.
commands.review_followup: A repair lane can mechanically materialize the updated submodule and regenerate the checked-in artifacts for this exact pin without a product decision.

target.title: chore(deps): bump plugins/a2a-gateway from `a335e59` to `3f0f4f5`
target.body:
Bumps [plugins/a2a-gateway](https://github.com/win4r/openclaw-a2a-gateway) from `a335e59` to `3f0f4f5`.
Commits
  • 3f0f4f5 fix: support OpenClaw gateway protocol v4 (#74)
  • 1a03a74 fix: raise A2A JSON body limit to allow inline file transfers (#69)
  • 6044306 fix: restore OpenClaw 2026.5.x compatibility (gateway methods + startup activ...
  • See full diff in compare view

Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
